game.subtitle: Guess the hit from the hook! 🎵

intro.title: Welcome to HookHunt
intro.description: Test your music knowledge by identifying songs from their iconic hooks.

playlistSelect.title: Choose Your Playlist
playlistSelect.missingClientId: Spotify Client ID is not configured.
playlistSelect.dropdownHint: Select one of your own playlists and start the game.
playlistSelect.sessionPersisted: Your Spotify login is saved on this device.
playlistSelect.noPlaylists: No playlists found on your Spotify account.

gameplay.title: Guess the song!
gameplay.revealedNoPoints: Track revealed. This round gives 0 points.
gameplay.noPlayableTracks: No playable tracks were found in this playlist (no preview clips and no streamable songs).
gameplay.spotifySdkUnavailable: Spotify browser playback could not be initialized.
gameplay.spotifyDeviceUnavailable: Spotify playback device is currently offline.
gameplay.spotifyPlayerNotReady: Spotify player is not ready yet. Please wait a moment and retry.
gameplay.spotifyPremiumRequired: Spotify Premium is required for browser playback.
gameplay.spotifyDrmUnsupported: Your browser/device currently cannot play Spotify DRM streams.
gameplay.trackUnavailable: This track is not available for browser playback.
gameplay.previewNotice: Preview clips are fixed 30-second snippets. Hook timestamp is estimated on full-track analysis.
gameplay.hookWindow: Listen carefully: each round plays only {{seconds}} seconds.
gameplay.hookSourcePreview: Source: Spotify 30s preview (snippet limited by HookHunt).
gameplay.hookSourceSpotify: Source: Spotify full track stream (auto-stopped after hook clip).
gameplay.previewPlaybackFailed: Could not play the preview clip.

footer.support_message: Support us to unlock more games!
footer.donation_message: Your donation helps us create better games.
